codes.rationale: Presenile dementia with depression is dementia with depression as a manifestation, not primary depression.
Senile dementia with depression is dementia with depression as a manifestation, not primary depression.
Mixed anxiety and depressive disorder is a distinct diagnostic entity combining two conditions; not a primary depression diagnosis.
Cotard's syndrome is a distinct psychiatric condition (delusional belief of being dead), not a primary depression diagnosis.
Postpartum major depression in remission indicates resolved/past depression, not active primary depression.

codes.term: Single major depressive episode, in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: This code describes a single major depressive episode in remission; clinical judgment is needed on whether remitted/resolved depression should be included in an active depression code list.

summary: Recall: 56.6% (60 of 106 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 92.3%. F1: 70.2%. 5 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.
